parsed_review.summary: CP00-331 is a descriptor-only intake-core "permission matrix slice" pack (RP10.P06.M03.S20-RP10.P06.M05.S15, risk B, 40 units). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level claim is honest and well-supported: the manifest and command-evidence declare production_ready:false with status implemented_pending_review, and the descriptor-verified milestone flag is backed by consistent implementation, tests, validators, contract, and the RP10 validator script. Scope matches the live closeout-pack-plan.json entry (line 414), the baseline, the registry binding/requirements, and the validators across unit count (40), range, risk class (B), deliverable distribution (test:7, security_audit:7, implementation:16, ui:8, claude_review:2), and micro-title distribution; deviation_from_plan:false holds. The implementation freezes every CP331 result with no-write/no-real-data/no-runtime flags, and the inherited row-extras encode evaluates_runtime_permission:false, writes_permission_decision:false, exposes_*_detail:false, writes_audit_event:false, deny_over_allow_enforced:true, cross_tenant_access_allowed:false, and security_trimming unauthorized_data_omitted:true. The authority boundary is enforced everywhere: descriptor.authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval:false, no_write_attestation.promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false, manifest claude_not_final_approver:true and enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation:true. Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic review packet/receipt handling (evidence_packet/gate strings) with no product runtime (no_hermes_runtime_receipt:true, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false). Review-hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded with valid JSON (exit 0, 1427-byte stdout), forbidden_review_evidence matches the CP178+ blockers, no invalid attempts are recorded for this pack, and changed-file-scope correctly isolates unrelated dirty files (LDIP result, workbook specs, docx). No P0/P1/P2 findings. One P3 advisory documents that manifest-referenced post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet on disk — expected at this read-only review step — and that command evidence is recorded rather than re-executed here. This review is independent and read-only and does not constitute final approval; human final approval remains required.

findings.title: Manifest references post-review artifacts not yet on disk; command evidence is recorded, not re-executed in this read-only review
findings.details: manifest.json evidence_refs/required_pack_artifacts list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-331/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist on disk (confirmed via Glob). This is the expected state at the 'read_only_claude_run_with_raw_capture' step of the documented hardening_sequence — these artifacts are produced from this review during normalize/receipt/adjudication/construction-inspection before commit. Separately, command-evidence.json records all expected validation commands (npm test, npm run validate, the rpXX/closeout/weighted/fullplan/goal/control-plane validators, git diff --check) at exit_code 0; as a read-only reviewer I cannot independently re-execute them, so the green result is consistent with the descriptor-only source I inspected but is attested rather than reproduced here.
findings.recommendation: Proceed: the final_closeout_validation gate must generate and validate claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json (and the normalized receipt) before the commit step, and a human approver must confirm before any enterprise-trust/runtime-opening claim. No source or evidence change is required from this review.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational only; no blocking action. The hardening_sequence (final_closeout_validation before commit) already requires these artifacts, and human final approval remains required. Does not block pack or goal closeout.
